name: Chinese Spaghetti (Frud Bee Hoon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork into small strips and marinade with ginger, garlic, 3 tablespoons sesame oil, sugar, and 2 tablespoons soy sauce for 30 minutes.
2. Cut cabbage and carrots into strips.
3. Fry eggs in a wok until desired doneness; break up into small pieces and set aside.
4. Soak rice sticks in hot water for 3-5 minutes, until springy; drain and rinse with cold water, then drain again.
5. Stir-fry vegetables (cabbage and carrots) for 1-2 minutes.
6. Add 2 tablespoons oyster sauce and 1 tablespoon soy sauce to the vegetables; stir until they are crunchy.
7. Set aside the cooked vegetables.
8. Stir-fry pork in a separate part of the wok, then set aside.
9. In another part of the wok, add garlic and rice sticks. Cook for a moment, then add 1 tablespoon sesame oil, oyster sauce, and soy sauce to taste.
10. Mix in the cooked pork, eggs, and vegetables with the rice sticks.
Note: Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature before cooking for optimal results.
